category_sources: Official GitHub README says Ultralist is simple task management for tech folks and links its documentation.
source_facts.description says "Simple GTD-style task management for the command-line".
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses "Ultralist" at https://github.com/gammons/ultralist.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documentation section points to the Ultralist website, but https://ultralist.io currently reports the site has been stopped, so the README documentation anchor is the best reachable official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is non-empty; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README documentation section lists concepts, quickstart, todos, recurrence, filtering, and syncing topics.
source_facts.description says GTD-style task management for the command line.
